items.content:
About This Role

We are seeking a Technical Recruiter to help us scale our engineering, data, and product teams. You will own the full-cycle recruiting process, from sourcing and screening through offer negotiation and close. We are growing rapidly and need a recruiter who can keep pace while maintaining a high bar for talent.

This role is equal parts talent scout, brand ambassador, and project manager. You will represent our company to candidates and work closely with hiring managers to build diverse, world-class teams.

Responsibilities

  • Manage full-cycle recruiting for engineering, data science, and product roles
  • Source passive candidates through LinkedIn, GitHub, conferences, and creative channels
  • Screen and assess candidates for technical skills, culture fit, and potential
  • Partner with hiring managers to define role requirements and interview processes
  • Manage candidate experience from first touch through onboarding
  • Track and report on recruiting metrics (time-to-fill, pipeline conversion, diversity)

Requirements

  • 3+ years of technical recruiting experience, preferably in-house at a technology company
  • Proven track record of filling engineering and technical roles
  • Strong sourcing skills and ability to engage passive candidates
  • Experience with ATS platforms (Greenhouse, Lever, or Ashby)
  • Excellent interpersonal and negotiation skills

Nice to Have

  • Experience recruiting for startup or high-growth environments
  • Understanding of technical concepts and ability to assess technical backgrounds
  • Passion for diversity, equity, and inclusion in hiring
